string.text: Settlement Manager Enhanced {VERSION}
Enable Mod
Master toggle. When off, no settlement fund or garrison auto actions will occur.
Show Notifications
Display information messages for fund burns, extra build speed, and prison-to-garrison recruits.
Fund Transfer & Boost
Enable Fund Scaling (2%/4% daily)

On player-owned towns/castles with current construction fund (BoostBuildingProcess) > 0: every day burn an extra 2% (town) / 4% (castle) of the fund as cost and grant additional build speed using 0.1 (town) / 0.05 (castle) efficiency. Layers on top of vanilla flat behavior. Supports up to 1M transfers.
Raise Transfer Limit to 1,000,000 (UI)
Patches the construction fund transfer slider. Vanilla ~10k cap raised to 1M.
Force Fund Scaling Pass Now
Immediately run fund % burn + build progress on all owned fortifications.
Castle Garrison Recruit
Castle Auto Recruit from Prison
Daily for owned castles: recruit ready prisoners from castle prison (first) and garrison prison into garrison. Ignore NPC heroes.
Minimum Prisoner Tier (Garrison)
Only auto-recruit prisoners of this tier or higher into castle garrisons.
Max Garrison Recruits Per Castle Per Day
Hard cap per castle on prisoners moved from prison(s) to garrison.
Prioritize High Tier Prisoners (Garrison)
Take higher tier first when recruiting for garrisons from prison.
Force Castle Garrison Recruit Now
Immediately recruit from prisons to garrisons for all owned castles.
Construction fund at {SETTLEMENT}: burned {COST} for +{BUILD} build speed.
Recruited {COUNT} prisoners from prison into {SETTLEMENT} garrison.
Forced fund pass affected {N} settlements.
Forced garrison recruit: {COUNT} prisoners.
SettlementManagerEnhanced failed to initialize Harmony. Check logs.
